global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and a clear call to action against a visually appealing background.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to try NovaPay with confidence.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text logo that reads 'NovaPay' in a prominent position at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large, soft-edged oval shape in a lighter shade, providing a subtle backdrop for the text elements.

elements.label: Background rectangle
elements.description: A rectangular shape with rounded corners, positioned behind the text, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Additional background shape
elements.description: A smaller, soft-edged shape that complements the main background elements.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent text area at the bottom of the ad that reads 'Save with confidence Try for free' in a clear, inviting font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Try for free

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The word 'NovaPay' displayed in a large, bold font at the top, capturing immediate attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and minimalistic, NovaPay logo, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by decorative elements, with the CTA positioned at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NovaPay, Save with confidence, Try for free
